assertions.title: Agent sidebar displays agents with status

steps.action: Map assertion to tests in panels.test.tsx
steps.expected: Coverage for agent names, status indicators/text, and API-driven sidebar data
steps.observed: Mapped to AgentSidebar tests (status indicators + status text) and Sidebar with API data test (renders agents from mock API response)

steps.action: Run file-scoped Vitest command with targeted test-name pattern

keyLines: AgentSidebar > renders agents with correct status indicators
AgentSidebar > renders status text for each agent
Sidebar with API data > renders agents from mock API response

steps.action: Map assertion to HeaderBar tests in panels.test.tsx
steps.expected: Coverage for connection status, total agent count, active run count
steps.observed: Mapped to HeaderBar tests for connected/disconnected status, agent count, and active run count

steps.action: Run file-scoped Vitest command with targeted test-name pattern

keyLines: HeaderBar > shows Connected status when connected
HeaderBar > shows Disconnected status when not connected

steps.action: Map assertion to StatusBar tests in panels.test.tsx
steps.expected: Coverage for disconnected/connected/thinking states, thread ID, and model
steps.observed: Mapped to StatusBar tests covering all required state and metadata combinations

steps.action: Run file-scoped Vitest command with targeted test-name pattern

keyLines: StatusBar > shows disconnected state by default
StatusBar > shows model name when available

assertions.title: Tab key cycles focus between panels

steps.action: Map assertion to Keyboard navigation test in panels.test.tsx
steps.expected: Tab cycles focus sidebar -> input -> sidebar
steps.observed: Mapped to test: Tab key cycles focus between sidebar and input bar

steps.action: Run file-scoped Vitest command with targeted test-name pattern

keyLines: Keyboard navigation > Tab key cycles focus between sidebar and input bar

assertions.title: Agent sidebar scrolls with arrow keys

steps.action: Map assertion to keyboard + scrolling tests in panels.test.tsx
steps.expected: Coverage for arrow-key navigation, long-list scrolling, and visible selected item movement
steps.observed: Mapped to tests for arrow key movement and scroll indicators including scrolled-above marker

steps.action: Run file-scoped Vitest command with targeted test-name pattern

keyLines: Keyboard navigation > arrow keys move sidebar selection down and up
Agent list scrolling > shows scroll indicators when agent list exceeds maxVisible
Agent list scrolling > shows ▲ indicator when scrolled past the beginning
Agent list scrolling > up arrow scrolls back showing agents above

frictions.description: Vitest -t output still includes non-matching tests as skipped entries, increasing log noise during evidence review.
frictions.resolution: Used file-scoped command and verbose reporter, then referenced exact passing test lines per assertion.

summary: Tested 5 assigned assertions (VAL-TUI-010..014) via deterministic file-scoped Vitest commands; all passed with exit code 0.
